---
title: "Pipeline Library (TransformsV2)"
format: html
---

The **pipeline library** is the on-disk catalog of saved [`PipelineDescriptor`](../../../src/TransformsV2/core/PipelineLoader.hpp) JSON files. It is separate from Triage Session command sequences and from workspace-embedded pipeline provenance.

See [pipeline_library_roadmap.md](pipeline_library_roadmap.md) for the full implementation plan.

## Storage location

Under the application config directory (`StateManager::configDir()`):

```
{config_dir}/pipelines/transforms_v2/*.json
```

On Linux this is typically `~/.config/WhiskerToolbox/pipelines/transforms_v2/`.

## Core API (Qt-free)

Headers live in `src/TransformsV2/core/`:

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `defaultUserPipelineDirectory(config_dir)` | Resolve the library path |
| `ensureUserPipelineDirectory(config_dir)` | Create the directory tree |
| `sanitizePipelineFilename(name)` | Filesystem-safe stem from a display name |
| `listPipelineFiles(directory)` | List `*.json` entries with display names |
| `loadPipelineDescriptorFromFile(path)` | Parse descriptor JSON |
| `savePipelineDescriptorToFile(path, descriptor)` | Write descriptor JSON |
| `deletePipelineFile(path)` | Remove a library file |
| `savePipelineToFile(path, descriptor)` | Same write path via `PipelineLoader` |
| `loadPipelineDescriptorFromJsonFile(path)` | Parse-only load (no `TransformPipeline` build) |

To execute a saved file, use `loadPipelineFromFile` (builds a `TransformPipeline`).

## JSON format

Files use the `PipelineDescriptor` schema documented in [`PipelineLoader.hpp`](../../../src/TransformsV2/core/PipelineLoader.hpp): `metadata`, optional `pre_reductions`, `steps`, optional `range_reduction`.

## Tests

[`test_pipeline_library.test.cpp`](../../../tests/TransformsV2/test_pipeline_library.test.cpp) covers path helpers, sanitization, catalog listing, and round-trip I/O including `pre_reductions` and `range_reduction`.
